## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SEO strategy, content planning, and potential growth opportunities for Swoogo's digital marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current SEO strategy is showing promising results with significant traffic growth in just over 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Focus shift needed towards creating more ICP-focused blogs and implementing lead magnets to improve conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Potential to implement website visitor tracking (e.g., Koala pixel) for better insights and future ABM strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Exploration of additional content strategies (newsletters, podcasts, webinars) to be considered for 2025 planning](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Performance and Strategy

  - [Impressive traffic growth achieved in just over 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Current focus on high-volume blogs (e.g., party planning) to drive traffic and improve domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Need to shift towards more ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) focused content](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Opportunity to implement lead magnets to improve conversion rates from current 0.1% to potentially 1-3%](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### Website Visitor Tracking and ABM

  - [Suggestion to implement Koala pixel for de-anonymizing website visitors](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Potential to set up basic triggers for sales team follow-up (e.g., abandoned cart, specific actions)](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Discussion about future ABM strategies, including coordinated outbound campaigns to target accounts](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [Stacey expressed interest but noted the need for an ABM enterprise manager in 2025 to fully utilize this data](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)

### Content Strategy Expansion

  - [Marcel shared a comprehensive list of content workstreams used for other clients](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Workstreams include editorial and content refreshes, interview long-form content, cross-format content repurposing, link building, and AI outbound](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Discussion about implementing attractive offers and lead magnets (e.g., hiring guides, ultimate conference guides)](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Exploration of newsletter strategy, showcasing success with another client (growth from 80k to 314k subscribers, 28% open rate)](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)

### 2025 Planning

  - [Rebecca and Stacey to have an in-depth discussion about brand and content strategy for 2025](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Need to prioritize content initiatives that can drive revenue while balancing other demand creation tactics](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Interest in understanding costs for adding new content tiers or strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)

### Team Capacity and Resources

  - [Rebecca acknowledged the challenge of having "eyes bigger than stomach" regarding opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Discussion about potential bottlenecks and areas where additional resources might be needed in the future](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send PDF of content workstreams and newsletter examples](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Rebecca and Stacey to review shared materials and discuss 2025 planning](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Team to consider implementing lead magnets as a low-hanging fruit opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Explore the possibility of adding Koala pixel for website visitor tracking](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Reconvene in a couple of weeks to discuss 2025 strategy and potential new content initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/ebEeCtUetN5AycYbPss2iGXhkSeNeS1r?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
